name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Browser**: Chrome/Firefox/Safari
- **Module**: Finance/Sales/POS/CRM/Inventory/HR
- **Organization**: (slug)
- **URL**: (full URL where the bug occurs)

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Additional Context
Any related errors from browser console or server logs.
